name: Serco Group PLC
description: A provider of outsourced public services to governments across defence, justice, immigration, healthcare and transport. Revenue ~£4.9bn with 5-6% underlying operating margin target.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue £4,877m in FY2025 (+1.9%). Long-term government outsourcing contracts across UK, Americas, Asia Pacific, Middle East. FY2026 guidance ~£5.0bn.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Underlying operating margin 5.6% within 5-6% target. FY2026 guidance ~6.0% (~£300m UOP). Mix shift toward higher-margin contracts.
assumptions.risks: Government austerity, contract rebids, political sensitivity of outsourcing, net debt £206m ex-leases (0.72x leverage), wage inflation on labour-intensive contracts.
assumptions.catalyst: FY2026 guidance: ~£300m UOP (+10%), margin ~6%. Buybacks (shares 1,104m→1,003m). Defence spending growth. Target leverage 1-2x.
